topic.what: CPA attack on masked Kyber achieving full key recovery with fewer power traces using novel lattice embedding technique
topic.how: Classifies recovered coefficients into confirmed positive/negative and unknown groups then applies half-twisted embedding combining Kannan and Bai-Galbraith methods to recover remaining secret key coefficients
topic.why_matters: Reduces attack complexity from 7000 to 400 traces enabling more practical side-channel attacks on masked PQC implementations

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of power traces required for full key recovery on masked Kyber
characteristics.evidence: Experimental results using ELMO simulation on ARM Cortex-M0
characteristics.context: First-order masked Kyber512/768/1024; 5% of previous full key recovery attack

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of power traces required for full key recovery on masked SABER
characteristics.evidence: Hamming weight model with σ=3 simulation
characteristics.context: First-order masked NTT-based SABER; first CPA attack on this target

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of power traces required for full key recovery on masked Dilithium
characteristics.evidence: Hamming weight model with σ=3 simulation
characteristics.context: First-order masked Dilithium NIST Level II; 20% of traces needed to recover all coefficients

characteristics.what_itasures: Sign distinguishing success rate for masked Kyber
characteristics.evidence: Experiment showing sign recovery limitation even with over 1 million traces on masked implementation
characteristics.context: Demonstrates difficulty of sign recovery under masking; motivates lattice-based approach

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of confirmed NTT coefficients needed from CPA for successful lattice recovery
characteristics.evidence: Randomly generated uSVP instances solved with BKZ block size 50
characteristics.context: With nI0=20 confirmed coefficients, need nI1≥35 (Kyber768/1024) or nI1≥43 (Kyber512) positive/negative coefficients

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of traces required by Tosun et al for masked Kyber (claimed 550 actually cannot recover signs)
characteristics.evidence: Paper analysis shows their method cannot recover signs efficiently on masked implementation
characteristics.context: Confirms claimed 250 traces not achievable for full key recovery
